rationale: XAG-USD consensus 49.7% at 1d (below coin flip for primary focus). BTC-USD 53% marginal. Both had heavy flip-flopping today.

key_predictive_features: Gold-silver ratio velocity (mean-reversion when >2 std from 60)
Real yield differential (10Y TIPS vs silver carry)
Industrial demand proxies: copper, solar installs, EV production
Central bank gold buying rate (silver follows with 2-3x beta)
India physical demand (tariff changes, e.g. today 6%->15%)
ETF flow direction (global silver ETF AUM changes)
fundamental_drivers: Industrial demand: 50%+ of silver is industrial (solar, electronics, EVs)
Mine supply declining while demand rising - structural deficit
Central bank gold buying at record pace - silver follows

cross_asset_correlations.VIX: Low, but spikes cause liquidation selling

seasonal_patterns: FOMC week: range-bound before, breakout after
papers_and_models: CNN+LSTM hybrid: MAPE <3% on 3yr silver data
GRU outperforms LSTM for sub-3yr prediction
recommended_new_signals: India physical demand proxy (tariff-adjusted import volume)
Silver ETF flow momentum (rate of change of AUM)
Gold-silver ratio velocity (rate of change, not just level)
deep_dives.implementation_notes: XAG 1d at 49.7% = no edge. 3d at 57.4% = medium-term works. Daily noise is the problem. Fix: (1) Disable/downweight intraday flippers (structure 48.7%, heikin_ashi 49.1%, ema 49.9%). (2) Weight 3d signals higher for XAG. (3) Add gold-silver ratio velocity. (4) Per-ticker signal weighting.

key_predictive_features: ETF flow momentum (daily flow direction + magnitude)
fundamental_drivers: Post-halving cycle: Apr 2024, peaks 12-18 months after
MSTR treasury 818K BTC (may sell for dividends now)
Fed rate policy: delayed cuts = headwind
Trump-Xi summit: trade deal progress = risk-on
seasonal_patterns: FOMC weeks: range before, break after
papers_and_models: Temporal Fusion Transformer + on-chain: best multi-horizon BTC predictor
MVRV Z-Score: cycle peaks within 2 weeks historically
recommended_new_signals: ETF daily flow momentum (acceleration, not just level)
Stablecoin supply ratio (USDT+USDC cap vs BTC)
deep_dives.implementation_notes: BTC 1d consensus 53% - marginal. On-chain at 60% is best but only 45 samples. Fix: (1) Increase on-chain weight for BTC. (2) Add ETF flow momentum. (3) Horizon-gate: BTC signals better at 3h-4h than 1d. (4) Consider MSTR-BTC spread signal.
